query: Argentina Decree 383/2025 Federal Police restructuring Departamento Federal de Investigaciones June 2025
a_issues: Content A is essentially irrelevant to the query. Its results are generic pages about Argentina (Wikipedia, Britannica, tourism, kids geography) and contain no facts about Decree 383/2025, the June 2025 Federal Police reform, or the Departamento Federal de Investigaciones (DFI). An LLM using only A could not answer the question correctly.
b_issues: Content B lacks the primary official source (Argentina.gob.ar / Boletín Oficial) and relies on secondary news reports, so it is less authoritative than the anchor. reasoning: B better enables a correct answer because it actually contains the key facts asked about: Decree 383/2025, issued in June 2025, reoriented the Policía Federal Argentina toward investigative functions and created the Departamento Federal de Investigaciones (DFI) / Federal Investigations Department as the new backbone of the force, with focus on complex/federal crimes. These facts align with the anchor, which shows Decreto 383/2025 was sanctioned on 16-06-2025 and concerns reform and modernization of the Policía Federal Argentina; the anchor also confirms that the DFI was created by that decree. By contrast, A contains no relevant information at all.
